agents.description: Surveys the past 24h of #marketing traffic and identifies underperforming campaigns
Drafts blog posts, ad copy, and outreach templates for human review
Maintains marketing-tech integration docs (HubSpot, Mailchimp, Segment) and surfaces drift

bench.name: marketing-output-bench
bench.description: Measures content production rate and campaign-metric accuracy over the past 24h
successCriteria: At least 1 draft piece of content per 24h cycle
Campaign metric delta reported within 12h of cycle start
No SEO/research queue item older than 72h pending
